title: erigeron breweri var. breweri
intro: Erigeron breweri var. breweri, also known as Brewer's fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Brewer's fleabane include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Brewer's fleabane can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for topical use, making it a versatile herb for natural remedies and health supplements.
